Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
   1: /**
   2:  * Transcript import 鈥?orchestration, cleaning, and manifest management.
   3:  * Port of scripts/_transcript_import.py
   4:  */
   5: 
   6: import { copyFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, appendFileSync } from 'node:fs'
   7: import { dirname, extname, join, basename, relative } from 'node:path'
   8: 
   9: import type { ManifestEntry, ParsedTranscript, TranscriptArtifact } from '../types/transcript.js'
  10: import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
  11: import {
  12:   loadJson,
  13:   normalizeTimestamp,
  14:   sha256File,
  15:   slugify,
  16:   timestampPartition,
  17:   yamlEscape,
  18: } from './common.js'
  19: import { upsertSearchIndex } from './db.js'
  20: 
  21: export async function importTranscript(
  22:   parsed: ParsedTranscript,
  23:   root: string,
  24:   globalRoot: string,
  25:   projectSlug: string,
  26:   rawUploadPermission: string,
  27:   mirrorToRepo = true,
  28: ): Promise<ManifestEntry> {
  29:   const importedAt = normalizeTimestamp(new Date())
  30:   const rawSha256 = sha256File(parsed.source_path)
  31:   const sessionLabel = slugify(
  32:     parsed.session_id,
  33:     slugify(stemOf(parsed.source_path), 'session'),
  34:   )
  35:   const artifactStem = `${sessionLabel}__${rawSha256.slice(0, 8)}`
  36:   const sourceSuffix = extname(parsed.source_path) || '.txt'
  37: 
  38:   const [yearToken, monthToken] = timestampPartition(parsed.started_at || importedAt)
  39: 
  40:   const repoRoot = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts')
  41:   const repoRawPath = join(repoRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)
  42:   const repoCleanPath = join(repoRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)
  43:   const repoManifestPath = join(repoRoot, 'manifests', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
  44:   const repoFullPath = join(repoRoot, 'full', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
  45: 
  46:   const globalRawPath = join(globalRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)
  47:   const globalCleanPath = join(globalRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)
  48:   const globalManifestPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'manifests', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
  49:   const globalFullPath = join(globalRoot, 'full', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
  50:   const globalEventLogPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'sessions.jsonl')
  51:   const globalDbPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'search.sqlite')
  52: 
  53:   for (const p of [globalRawPath, globalCleanPath, globalManifestPath, globalFullPath, globalEventLogPath, globalDbPath]) {
  54:     mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })
  55:   }
  56:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
  57:     for (const p of [repoRawPath, repoCleanPath, repoManifestPath, repoFullPath]) {
  58:       mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })
  59:     }
  60:   }
  61: 
  62:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
  63:     copyFile(parsed.source_path, repoRawPath)
  64:   }
  65:   copyFile(parsed.source_path, globalRawPath)
  66: 
  67:   let manifest: ManifestEntry = {
  68:     client: parsed.client,
  69:     project: projectSlug,
  70:     session_id: parsed.session_id,
  71:     title: parsed.title,
  72:     started_at: parsed.started_at,
  73:     imported_at: importedAt,
  74:     cwd: parsed.cwd,
  75:     branch: parsed.branch,
  76:     raw_source_path: toPosixPath(parsed.source_path),
  77:     raw_sha256: rawSha256,
  78:     raw_upload_permission: rawUploadPermission,
  79:     repo_raw_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoRawPath)) : '',
  80:     repo_clean_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoCleanPath)) : '',
  81:     repo_manifest_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoManifestPath)) : '',
  82:     repo_full_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoFullPath)) : '',
  83:     global_raw_path: toPosixPath(globalRawPath),
  84:     global_clean_path: toPosixPath(globalCleanPath),
  85:     global_manifest_path: toPosixPath(globalManifestPath),
  86:     global_full_path: toPosixPath(globalFullPath),
  87:     message_count: parsed.messages.length,
  88:     tool_event_count: parsed.tool_events.length,
  89:     event_count: parsed.events.length,
  90:     cleaning_mode: 'deterministic-code',
  91:     repo_mirror_enabled: mirrorToRepo,
  92:   }
  93: 
  94:   const existingGlobalManifest = loadJson(globalManifestPath)
  95:   manifest = preserveExistingImportTimestamp(existingGlobalManifest, manifest)
  96: 
  97:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
  98:     writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, repoCleanPath)
  99:     writeFullJson(parsed, repoFullPath)
 100:   }
 101:   writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, globalCleanPath)
 102:   writeFullJson(parsed, globalFullPath)
 103:   const manifestRecord = { ...manifest } as Record<string, unknown>
 104:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
 105:     writeJson(repoManifestPath, manifestRecord)
 106:   }
 107:   const appendToEventLog = existingGlobalManifest === null || !deepEqual(existingGlobalManifest, manifestRecord)
 108:   writeJson(globalManifestPath, manifestRecord)
 109:   if (appendToEventLog) {
 110:     appendJsonl(globalEventLogPath, manifestRecord)
 111:   }
 112:   await upsertSearchIndex(globalDbPath, manifest)
 113: 
 114:   return manifest
 115: }
 116: 
 117: export function transcriptHasContent(parsed: ParsedTranscript): boolean {
 118:   return parsed.messages.length > 0 || parsed.tool_events.length > 0 || parsed.events.length > 0
 119: }
 120: 
 121: export function writeCleanMarkdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: ManifestEntry, filePath: string): void {
 122:   const lines: string[] = [
 123:     '---',
 124:     `client: ${manifest.client}`,
 125:     `project: ${manifest.project}`,
 126:     `session_id: ${manifest.session_id}`,
 127:     `title: ${yamlEscape(manifest.title)}`,
 128:     `started_at: ${manifest.started_at}`,
 129:     `imported_at: ${manifest.imported_at}`,
 130:     `cwd: ${yamlEscape(manifest.cwd)}`,
 131:     `branch: ${yamlEscape(manifest.branch)}`,
 132:     `raw_source_path: ${yamlEscape(manifest.raw_source_path)}`,
 133:     `raw_sha256: ${manifest.raw_sha256}`,
 134:     `raw_upload_permission: ${manifest.raw_upload_permission}`,
 135:     `cleaning_mode: ${manifest.cleaning_mode}`,
 136:     '---',
 137:     '',
 138:     `# ${manifest.title || manifest.session_id}`,
 139:     '',
 140:     '## Metadata',
 141:     `- Client: \`${manifest.client}\``,
 142:     `- Project: \`${manifest.project}\``,
 143:     `- Session ID: \`${manifest.session_id}\``,
 144:     `- Started At: \`${manifest.started_at}\``,
 145:     `- Imported At: \`${manifest.imported_at}\``,
 146:     `- Raw SHA256: \`${manifest.raw_sha256}\``,
 147:     `- Raw Source: \`${manifest.raw_source_path}\``,
 148:     `- Repo Raw Path: \`${manifest.repo_raw_path}\``,
 149:     `- Repo Clean Path: \`${manifest.repo_clean_path}\``,
 150:     '',
 151:     '## Messages',
 152:   ]
 153: 
 154:   if (parsed.messages.length > 0) {
 155:     for (let i = 0; i < parsed.messages.length; i++) {
 156:       const message = parsed.messages[i]!
 157:       lines.push(
 158:         `### ${i + 1}. ${message.role}`,
 159:         `- Timestamp: \`${message.timestamp ?? manifest.started_at}\``,
 160:         '',
 161:         message.text,
 162:         '',
 163:       )
 164:     }
 165:   } else {
 166:     lines.push(
 167:       'No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.',
 168:       '',
 169:     )
 170:   }
 171: 
 172:   writeFileSync(filePath, lines.join('\n'), 'utf-8')
 173: }
 174: 
 175: export function writeFullJson(parsed: ParsedTranscript, filePath: string): void {
 176:   const artifact: TranscriptArtifact = {
 177:     schema_version: 'transcript.full.v1',
 178:     ...parsed,
 179:   }
 180:   writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(artifact, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
 181: }
 182: 
 183: export function preserveExistingImportTimestamp(
 184:   existing: Record<string, unknown> | null,
 185:   payload: ManifestEntry,
 186: ): ManifestEntry {
 187:   if (existing === null) return payload
 188:   const payloadRecord = { ...payload } as Record<string, unknown>
 189:   if (!deepEqual(manifestSignature(existing), manifestSignature(payloadRecord))) return payload
 190:   const importedAt = existing['imported_at']
 191:   if (typeof importedAt === 'string' && importedAt) {
 192:     return { ...payload, imported_at: importedAt }
 193:   }
 194:   return payload
 195: }
 196: 
 197: export function manifestSignature(payload: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown> {
 198:   const result: Record<string, unknown> = {}
 199:   for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(payload)) {
 200:     if (key !== 'imported_at') {
 201:       result[key] = value
 202:     }
 203:   }
 204:   return result
 205: }
 206: 
 207: export function manifestChanged(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): boolean {
 208:   if (!existsSync(filePath)) return true
 209:   try {
 210:     const current = JSON.parse(readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')) as Record<string, unknown>
 211:     return !deepEqual(current, payload)
 212:   } catch {
 213:     return true
 214:   }
 215: }
 216: 
 217: export function writeJson(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
 218:   writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
 219: }
 220: 
 221: export function appendJsonl(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
 222:   appendFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload) + '\n', 'utf-8')
 223: }
 224: 
 225: export function copyFile(source: string, destination: string): void {
 226:   if (source === destination) return
 227:   copyFileSync(source, destination)
 228: }
 229: 
 230: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 231: // Internal helpers
 232: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 233: 
 234: function stemOf(filePath: string): string {
 235:   const base = basename(filePath)
 236:   const ext = extname(base)
 237:   return ext ? base.slice(0, -ext.length) : base
 238: }
 239: 
 240: function deepEqual(a: unknown, b: unknown): boolean {
 241:   if (a === b) return true
 242:   if (a === null || b === null || typeof a !== typeof b) return false
 243:   if (typeof a !== 'object') return false
 244:   if (Array.isArray(a) !== Array.isArray(b)) return false
 245:   const aObj = a as Record<string, unknown>
 246:   const bObj = b as Record<string, unknown>
 247:   const aKeys = Object.keys(aObj)
 248:   const bKeys = Object.keys(bObj)
 249:   if (aKeys.length !== bKeys.length) return false
 250:   return aKeys.every(key => deepEqual(aObj[key], bObj[key]))
 251: }

 import {
   loadJson,

   sha256File,

 } from './common.js'
 import { upsertSearchIndex } from './db.js'
 
+export type ImportStatus = 'created' | 'updated' | 'unchanged'
+
+export interface ImportTranscriptResult extends ManifestEntry {
+  status: ImportStatus
+}
+
 export async function importTranscript(
   parsed: ParsedTranscript,
   root: string,
   globalRoot: string,
   projectSlug: string,
   rawUploadPermission: string,
   mirrorToRepo = true,

   }
 
   const existingGlobalManifest = loadJson(globalManifestPath)

   manifest = preserveExistingImportTimestamp(existingGlobalManifest, manifest)
+  const manifestRecord = { ...manifest } as Record<string, unknown>
+  const cleanMarkdown = buildCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest)
+  const fullJson = buildFullJson(parsed)
+  const manifestJson = buildJsonText(manifestRecord)
+  let changed = false
+
+  if (mirrorToRepo) {
+    changed = copyFileIfMissing(parsed.source_path, repoRawPath) || changed

+  changed = writeTextIfChanged(globalFullPath, fullJson) || changed

 export function transcriptHasContent(parsed: ParsedTranscript): boolean {
   return parsed.messages.length > 0 || parsed.tool_events.length > 0 || parsed.events.length > 0
 }
 
 export function writeCleanMarkdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: ManifestEntry, filePath: string): void {
+  writeFileSync(filePath, buildCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest), 'utf-8')
+}

     '---',
@@

     )
   }
 
-  writeFileSync(filePath, lines.join('\n'), 'utf-8')

-  const artifact: TranscriptArtifact = {
-    schema_version: 'transcript.full.v1',
-    ...parsed,
-  }
-  writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(artifact, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
+  writeFileSync(filePath, buildFullJson(parsed), 'utf-8')

@@
 export function writeJson(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
-  writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
+  writeFileSync(filePath, buildJsonText(payload), 'utf-8')
 }
@@
 function stemOf(filePath: string): string {
   const base = basename(filePath)
   const ext = extname(base)
   return ext ? base.slice(0, -ext.length) : base
 }
 
+function buildFullJson(parsed: ParsedTranscript): string {
+  const artifact: TranscriptArtifact = {
+    schema_version: 'transcript.full.v1',
+    ...parsed,
+  }
+  return JSON.stringify(artifact, null, 2) + '\n'
+}
+
+function buildJsonText(payload: Record<string, unknown>): string {
+  return JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2) + '\n'
+}
+
+function writeTextIfChanged(filePath: string, content: string): boolean {
+  if (existsSync(filePath)) {
+    try {
+      if (readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8') === content) {
+        return false
+      }
+    } catch {
+      // Fall through and rewrite unreadable files.
+    }
+  }
+
+  writeFileSync(filePath, content, 'utf-8')
+  return true
+}
+
+function copyFileIfMissing(source: string, destination: string): boolean {
+  if (source === destination || existsSync(destination)) {
+    return false
+  }
+
+  copyFileSync(source, destination)
+  return true
+}
+
 function deepEqual(a: unknown, b: unknown): boolean {
*** End Patch

 export function preserveExistingImportTimestamp(
@@ -215,7 +228,7 @@ export function manifestChanged(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknow
 }
 
 export function writeJson(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
-  writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
+  writeFileSync(filePath, buildJsonText(payload), 'utf-8')
 }
 
 export function appendJsonl(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
@@ -237,6 +250,42 @@ function stemOf(filePath: string): string {
   return ext ? base.slice(0, -ext.length) : base
 }
 
+function buildFullJson(parsed: ParsedTranscript): string {
+  const artifact: TranscriptArtifact = {
+    schema_version: 'transcript.full.v1',
+    ...parsed,
+  }
+  return JSON.stringify(artifact, null, 2) + '\n'
+}
+
+function buildJsonText(payload: Record<string, unknown>): string {
+  return JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2) + '\n'
+}
+
+function writeTextIfChanged(filePath: string, content: string): boolean {
+  if (existsSync(filePath)) {
+    try {
+      if (readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8') === content) {
+        return false
+      }
+    } catch {
+      // Fall through and rewrite unreadable files.
+    }
+  }
+
+  writeFileSync(filePath, content, 'utf-8')
+  return true
+}
+
+function copyFileIfMissing(source: string, destination: string): boolean {
+  if (source === destination || existsSync(destination)) {
+    return false
+  }
+
+  copyFileSync(source, destination)
+  return true
+}
+
 function deepEqual(a: unknown, b: unknown): boolean {
   if (a === b) return true
   if (a === null || b === null || typeof a !== typeof b) return false

Output:
Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
   1: /**
   2:  * Transcript import 鈥?orchestration, cleaning, and manifest management.
   3:  * Port of scripts/_transcript_import.py
   4:  */
   5: 
   6: import { copyFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, appendFileSync } from 'node:fs'
   7: import { dirname, extname, join, basename, relative } from 'node:path'
   8: 
   9: import type { ManifestEntry, ParsedTranscript, TranscriptArtifact } from '../types/transcript.js'
  10: import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
  11: import {
  12:   loadJson,
  13:   normalizeTimestamp,
  14:   sha256File,
  15:   slugify,
  16:   timestampPartition,
  17:   yamlEscape,
  18: } from './common.js'
  19: import { upsertSearchIndex } from './db.js'
  20: 
  21: export type ImportStatus = 'created' | 'updated' | 'unchanged'
  22: 
  23: export interface ImportTranscriptResult extends ManifestEntry {
  24:   status: ImportStatus
  25: }
  26: 
  27: export async function importTranscript(
  28:   parsed: ParsedTranscript,
  29:   root: string,
  30:   globalRoot: string,
  31:   projectSlug: string,
  32:   rawUploadPermission: string,
  33:   mirrorToRepo = true,
  34: ): Promise<ImportTranscriptResult> {
  35:   const importedAt = normalizeTimestamp(new Date())
  36:   const rawSha256 = sha256File(parsed.source_path)
  37:   const sessionLabel = slugify(
  38:     parsed.session_id,
  39:     slugify(stemOf(parsed.source_path), 'session'),
  40:   )
  41:   const artifactStem = `${sessionLabel}__${rawSha256.slice(0, 8)}`
  42:   const sourceSuffix = extname(parsed.source_path) || '.txt'
  43: 
  44:   const [yearToken, monthToken] = timestampPartition(parsed.started_at || importedAt)
  45: 
  46:   const repoRoot = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts')
  47:   const repoRawPath = join(repoRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)
  48:   const repoCleanPath = join(repoRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)
  49:   const repoManifestPath = join(repoRoot, 'manifests', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
  50:   const repoFullPath = join(repoRoot, 'full', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
  51: 
  52:   const globalRawPath = join(globalRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)
  53:   const globalCleanPath = join(globalRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)
  54:   const globalManifestPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'manifests', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
  55:   const globalFullPath = join(globalRoot, 'full', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
  56:   const globalEventLogPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'sessions.jsonl')
  57:   const globalDbPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'search.sqlite')
  58: 
  59:   for (const p of [globalRawPath, globalCleanPath, globalManifestPath, globalFullPath, globalEventLogPath, globalDbPath]) {
  60:     mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })
  61:   }
  62:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
  63:     for (const p of [repoRawPath, repoCleanPath, repoManifestPath, repoFullPath]) {
  64:       mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })
  65:     }
  66:   }
  67: 
  68:   let manifest: ManifestEntry = {
  69:     client: parsed.client,
  70:     project: projectSlug,
  71:     session_id: parsed.session_id,
  72:     title: parsed.title,
  73:     started_at: parsed.started_at,
  74:     imported_at: importedAt,
  75:     cwd: parsed.cwd,
  76:     branch: parsed.branch,
  77:     raw_source_path: toPosixPath(parsed.source_path),
  78:     raw_sha256: rawSha256,
  79:     raw_upload_permission: rawUploadPermission,
  80:     repo_raw_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoRawPath)) : '',
  81:     repo_clean_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoCleanPath)) : '',
  82:     repo_manifest_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoManifestPath)) : '',
  83:     repo_full_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoFullPath)) : '',
  84:     global_raw_path: toPosixPath(globalRawPath),
  85:     global_clean_path: toPosixPath(globalCleanPath),
  86:     global_manifest_path: toPosixPath(globalManifestPath),
  87:     global_full_path: toPosixPath(globalFullPath),
  88:     message_count: parsed.messages.length,
  89:     tool_event_count: parsed.tool_events.length,
  90:     event_count: parsed.events.length,
  91:     cleaning_mode: 'deterministic-code',
  92:     repo_mirror_enabled: mirrorToRepo,
  93:   }
  94: 
  95:   const existingGlobalManifest = loadJson(globalManifestPath)
  96:   const hadExistingGlobalManifest = existingGlobalManifest !== null
  97:   manifest = preserveExistingImportTimestamp(existingGlobalManifest, manifest)
  98:   const manifestRecord = { ...manifest } as Record<string, unknown>
  99:   const cleanMarkdown = buildCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest)
 100:   const fullJson = buildFullJson(parsed)
 101:   const manifestJson = buildJsonText(manifestRecord)
 102:   let changed = false
 103: 
 104:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
 105:     changed = copyFileIfMissing(parsed.source_path, repoRawPath) || changed
 106:   }
 107:   changed = copyFileIfMissing(parsed.source_path, globalRawPath) || changed
 108: 
 109:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
 110:     changed = writeTextIfChanged(repoCleanPath, cleanMarkdown) || changed
 111:     changed = writeTextIfChanged(repoFullPath, fullJson) || changed
 112:     changed = writeTextIfChanged(repoManifestPath, manifestJson) || changed
 113:   }
 114:   changed = writeTextIfChanged(globalCleanPath, cleanMarkdown) || changed
 115:   changed = writeTextIfChanged(globalFullPath, fullJson) || changed
 116:   const appendToEventLog = existingGlobalManifest === null || !deepEqual(existingGlobalManifest, manifestRecord)
 117:   changed = writeTextIfChanged(globalManifestPath, manifestJson) || changed
 118:   if (appendToEventLog) {
 119:     appendJsonl(globalEventLogPath, manifestRecord)
 120:     changed = true
 121:   }
 122:   await upsertSearchIndex(globalDbPath, manifest)
 123: 
 124:   return {
 125:     ...manifest,
 126:     status: hadExistingGlobalManifest ? (changed ? 'updated' : 'unchanged') : 'created',
 127:   }
 128: }
 129: 
 130: export function transcriptHasContent(parsed: ParsedTranscript): boolean {
 131:   return parsed.messages.length > 0 || parsed.tool_events.length > 0 || parsed.events.length > 0
 132: }
 133: 
 134: export function writeCleanMarkdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: ManifestEntry, filePath: string): void {
 135:   writeFileSync(filePath, buildCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest), 'utf-8')
 136: }
 137: 
 138: function buildCleanMarkdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: ManifestEntry): string {
 139:   const lines: string[] = [
 140:     '---',
 141:     `client: ${manifest.client}`,
 142:     `project: ${manifest.project}`,
 143:     `session_id: ${manifest.session_id}`,
 144:     `title: ${yamlEscape(manifest.title)}`,
 145:     `started_at: ${manifest.started_at}`,
 146:     `imported_at: ${manifest.imported_at}`,
 147:     `cwd: ${yamlEscape(manifest.cwd)}`,
 148:     `branch: ${yamlEscape(manifest.branch)}`,
 149:     `raw_source_path: ${yamlEscape(manifest.raw_source_path)}`,
 150:     `raw_sha256: ${manifest.raw_sha256}`,
 151:     `raw_upload_permission: ${manifest.raw_upload_permission}`,
 152:     `cleaning_mode: ${manifest.cleaning_mode}`,
 153:     '---',
 154:     '',
 155:     `# ${manifest.title || manifest.session_id}`,
 156:     '',
 157:     '## Metadata',
 158:     `- Client: \`${manifest.client}\``,
 159:     `- Project: \`${manifest.project}\``,
 160:     `- Session ID: \`${manifest.session_id}\``,
 161:     `- Started At: \`${manifest.started_at}\``,
 162:     `- Imported At: \`${manifest.imported_at}\``,
 163:     `- Raw SHA256: \`${manifest.raw_sha256}\``,
 164:     `- Raw Source: \`${manifest.raw_source_path}\``,
 165:     `- Repo Raw Path: \`${manifest.repo_raw_path}\``,
 166:     `- Repo Clean Path: \`${manifest.repo_clean_path}\``,
 167:     '',
 168:     '## Messages',
 169:   ]
 170: 
 171:   if (parsed.messages.length > 0) {
 172:     for (let i = 0; i < parsed.messages.length; i++) {
 173:       const message = parsed.messages[i]!
 174:       lines.push(
 175:         `### ${i + 1}. ${message.role}`,
 176:         `- Timestamp: \`${message.timestamp ?? manifest.started_at}\``,
 177:         '',
 178:         message.text,
 179:         '',
 180:       )
 181:     }
 182:   } else {
 183:     lines.push(
 184:       'No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.',
 185:       '',
 186:     )
 187:   }
 188: 
 189:   return lines.join('\n')
 190: }
 191: 
 192: export function writeFullJson(parsed: ParsedTranscript, filePath: string): void {
 193:   writeFileSync(filePath, buildFullJson(parsed), 'utf-8')
 194: }
 195: 
 196: export function preserveExistingImportTimestamp(
 197:   existing: Record<string, unknown> | null,
 198:   payload: ManifestEntry,
 199: ): ManifestEntry {
 200:   if (existing === null) return payload
 201:   const payloadRecord = { ...payload } as Record<string, unknown>
 202:   if (!deepEqual(manifestSignature(existing), manifestSignature(payloadRecord))) return payload
 203:   const importedAt = existing['imported_at']
 204:   if (typeof importedAt === 'string' && importedAt) {
 205:     return { ...payload, imported_at: importedAt }
 206:   }
 207:   return payload
 208: }
 209: 
 210: export function manifestSignature(payload: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown> {
 211:   const result: Record<string, unknown> = {}
 212:   for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(payload)) {
 213:     if (key !== 'imported_at') {
 214:       result[key] = value
 215:     }
 216:   }
 217:   return result
 218: }
 219: 
 220: export function manifestChanged(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): boolean {
 221:   if (!existsSync(filePath)) return true
 222:   try {
 223:     const current = JSON.parse(readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')) as Record<string, unknown>
 224:     return !deepEqual(current, payload)
 225:   } catch {
 226:     return true
 227:   }
 228: }
 229: 
 230: export function writeJson(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
 231:   writeFileSync(filePath, buildJsonText(payload), 'utf-8')
 232: }
 233: 
 234: export function appendJsonl(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
 235:   appendFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload) + '\n', 'utf-8')
 236: }
 237: 
 238: export function copyFile(source: string, destination: string): void {
 239:   if (source === destination) return
 240:   copyFileSync(source, destination)
 241: }
 242: 
 243: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 244: // Internal helpers
 245: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 246: 
 247: function stemOf(filePath: string): string {
 248:   const base = basename(filePath)
 249:   const ext = extname(base)
 250:   return ext ? base.slice(0, -ext.length) : base
 251: }
 252: 
 253: function buildFullJson(parsed: ParsedTranscript): string {
 254:   const artifact: TranscriptArtifact = {
 255:     schema_version: 'transcript.full.v1',
 256:     ...parsed,
 257:   }
 258:   return JSON.stringify(artifact, null, 2) + '\n'
 259: }
 260: 
 261: function buildJsonText(payload: Record<string, unknown>): string {
 262:   return JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2) + '\n'
 263: }
 264: 
 265: function writeTextIfChanged(filePath: string, content: string): boolean {
 266:   if (existsSync(filePath)) {
 267:     try {
 268:       if (readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8') === content) {
 269:         return false
 270:       }
 271:     } catch {
 272:       // Fall through and rewrite unreadable files.
 273:     }
 274:   }
 275: 
 276:   writeFileSync(filePath, content, 'utf-8')
 277:   return true
 278: }
 279: 
 280: function copyFileIfMissing(source: string, destination: string): boolean {
 281:   if (source === destination || existsSync(destination)) {
 282:     return false
 283:   }
 284: 
 285:   copyFileSync(source, destination)
 286:   return true
 287: }
 288: 
 289: function deepEqual(a: unknown, b: unknown): boolean {
 290:   if (a === b) return true
 291:   if (a === null || b === null || typeof a !== typeof b) return false
 292:   if (typeof a !== 'object') return false
 293:   if (Array.isArray(a) !== Array.isArray(b)) return false
 294:   const aObj = a as Record<string, unknown>
 295:   const bObj = b as Record<string, unknown>
 296:   const aKeys = Object.keys(aObj)
 297:   const bKeys = Object.keys(bObj)
 298:   if (aKeys.length !== bKeys.length) return false
 299:   return aKeys.every(key => deepEqual(aObj[key], bObj[key]))
 300: }
Tool Result #303 shell_command call_4HaMWBSaDLAH3DgrIr1R5rzm exit 0 04:15:59
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.8 seconds Output: Using Node v20.20.1 Using Node v20.20.1 1: /** 2: * MemoryTree heartbeat 鈥?single execution, stateless, idempotent. 3: * Port of scri...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.8 seconds
Output:
Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
   1: /**
   2:  * MemoryTree heartbeat 鈥?single execution, stateless, idempotent.
   3:  * Port of scripts/heartbeat.py
   4:  */
   5: 
   6: import type { ParsedTranscript } from '../types/transcript.js'
   7: import { discoverSourceFiles, transcriptMatchesRepo } from '../transcript/discover.js'
   8: import { importTranscript, transcriptHasContent } from '../transcript/import.js'
   9: import { parseTranscript } from '../transcript/parse.js'
  10: import { slugify } from '../transcript/common.js'
  11: import { defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot } from '../transcript/discover.js'
  12: import type { Config, ProjectEntry, RawUploadPermission } from './config.js'
  13: import {
  14:   findProjectForPath,
  15:   loadConfig,
  16:   noteProjectHeartbeatRun,
  17:   projectDisplayName,
  18:   projectExecutionPath,
  19:   projectIsDue,
  20:   saveConfig,
  21: } from './config.js'
  22: import { acquireLock, releaseLock } from './lock.js'
  23: import { resetFailureCount, writeAlert, writeAlertWithThreshold } from './alert.js'
  24: import type { LogLevel } from './log.js'
  25: import { getLogger, setupLogging } from './log.js'
  26: import { MANAGED_REPO_PATHS, syncProjectContextToMemory, syncProjectOutputsToDevelopment } from './sync.js'
  27: import { collectExtraManifestDirs } from '../report/extra-manifests.js'
  28: import {
  29:   ensureBranchUpstream,
  30:   ensureProjectWorktree,
  31:   hasTrackingUpstream,
  32:   isProjectMemoryBranch,
  33:   pushBranchToRemote,
  34:   redactRemoteUrl,
  35: } from './worktree.js'
  36: import { git } from '../utils/exec.js'
  37: import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
  38: import { basename, join, resolve } from 'node:path'
  39: import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'
  40: 
  41: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  42: // Sensitive pattern detection
  43: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  44: 
  45: const SENSITIVE_PATTERNS: readonly RegExp[] = [
  46:   /(?:api[_-]?key|apikey)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
  47:   /(?:password|passwd|pwd)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
  48:   /(?:secret|token)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
  49:   /(?:sk-|pk_live_|sk_live_|ghp_|gho_|glpat-)\S{10,}/,
  50:   /Bearer\s+\S{20,}/i,
  51: ]
  52: 
  53: const RAW_TRANSCRIPT_PREFIX = 'Memory/06_transcripts/raw/'
  54: const MAX_GIT_ADD_PATH_CHARS = 12_000
  55: 
  56: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  57: // Main entry point
  58: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  59: 
  60: export interface HeartbeatRunOptions {
  61:   readonly force?: boolean
  62:   readonly root?: string
  63: }
  64: 
  65: export async function main(options: HeartbeatRunOptions = {}): Promise<number> {
  66:   const config = loadConfig()
  67:   setupLogging(config.log_level as LogLevel)
  68:   const logger = getLogger()
  69: 
  70:   if (!acquireLock()) {
  71:     logger.info('Another heartbeat instance is running. Exiting.')
  72:     writeAlert('global', 'lock_held', 'Heartbeat exited: another instance held the lock.')
  73:     return 0
  74:   }
  75: 
  76:   try {
  77:     return await runHeartbeat(config, options)
  78:   } finally {
  79:     releaseLock()
  80:   }
  81: }
  82: 
  83: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  84: // Heartbeat orchestration
  85: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  86: 
  87: export async function runHeartbeat(config: Config, options: HeartbeatRunOptions = {}): Promise<number> {
  88:   const logger = getLogger()
  89:   const targetProject = options.root ? findProjectForPath(config, resolve(options.root)) : null
  90: 
  91:   if (config.projects.length === 0) {
  92:     logger.info('No projects registered in config.toml. Nothing to do.')
  93:     return 0
  94:   }
  95:   if (options.root && !targetProject) {
  96:     logger.warn(`No registered project matched: ${resolve(options.root)}`)
  97:     return 1
  98:   }
  99: 
 100:   const projects = targetProject ? [targetProject] : config.projects
 101: 
 102:   logger.info(`Heartbeat started. ${projects.length} project(s) selected.`)
 103: 
 104:   let nextConfig = config
 105:   let configChanged = false
 106:   const now = new Date()
 107:   const runTimestamp = now.toISOString()
 108: 
 109:   for (const entry of projects) {
 110:     const projectName = projectDisplayName(entry)
 111:     const projectPath = resolve(projectExecutionPath(entry))
 112:     const heartbeatDue = options.force === true || projectIsDue(entry, now)
 113: 
 114:     if (!heartbeatDue) {
 115:       logger.debug(`[${projectName}] Not due yet, skipping.`)
 116:       continue
 117:     }
 118: 
 119:     try {
 120:       const worktree = ensureProjectWorktree(entry)
 121:       if (!existsSync(projectPath)) {
 122:         logger.warn(`Project path does not exist, skipping: ${projectPath}`)
 123:         continue
 124:       }
 125: 
 126:       if (worktree.created) {
 127:         logger.info(`[${projectName}] Created worktree on branch '${worktree.branch}'.`)
 128:       }
 129: 
 130:       const contextSync = syncProjectContextToMemory(entry)
 131:       if (!contextSync.skipped) {
 132:         logger.info(
 133:           `[${projectName}] Synced context to ${worktree.branch} ` +
 134:           `(copied ${contextSync.copied}, deleted ${contextSync.deleted}).`,
 135:         )
 136:       }
 137: 
 138:       const extraManifestDirs = collectExtraManifestDirs(projectPath)
 139:       const contextChanged = !contextSync.skipped && (contextSync.copied > 0 || contextSync.deleted > 0)
 140:       await processProject(config, projectPath, projectName, entry, extraManifestDirs, contextChanged)
 141:       nextConfig = noteProjectHeartbeatRun(nextConfig, entry.id, runTimestamp)
 142:       configChanged = true
 143: 
 144:       const outputSync = syncProjectOutputsToDevelopment(entry)
 145:       if (!outputSync.skipped) {
 146:         logger.info(
 147:           `[${projectName}] Synced outputs back to development directory ` +
 148:           `(copied ${outputSync.copied}, deleted ${outputSync.deleted}).`,
 149:         )
 150:       }
 151:     } catch (err: unknown) {
 152:       logger.exception(`Error processing project: ${projectPath}`, err)
 153:       writeAlertWithThreshold(
 154:         toPosixPath(projectPath),
 155:         'push_failed',
 156:         `Heartbeat error for project: ${basename(projectPath)}`,
 157:       )
 158:     }
 159:   }
 160: 
 161:   if (configChanged) {
 162:     saveConfig(nextConfig)
 163:   }
 164: 
 165:   logger.info('Heartbeat finished.')
 166:   return 0
 167: }
 168: 
 169: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 170: // Per-project processing
 171: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 172: 
 173: export async function processProject(
 174:   config: Config,
 175:   projectPath: string,
 176:   projectName: string,
 177:   project?: ProjectEntry,
 178:   extraManifestDirs?: string[],
 179:   contextChanged = false,
 180: ): Promise<void> {
 181:   const logger = getLogger()
 182:   const repoSlug = slugify(projectName, 'project')
 183:   const globalRoot = defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()
 184:   const branch = currentBranch(projectPath)
 185:   const mirrorToRepo = isDedicatedMemorytreeBranch(branch, project)
 186:   const autoPush = project?.auto_push ?? config.auto_push ?? true
 187:   const generateReport = project?.generate_report ?? config.generate_report ?? false
 188:   const aiSummaryModel = project?.ai_summary_model ?? config.ai_summary_model ?? 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'
 189:   const locale = project?.locale ?? config.locale ?? 'en'
 190:   const ghPagesBranch = project?.gh_pages_branch ?? config.gh_pages_branch ?? ''
 191:   const cname = project?.cname ?? config.cname ?? ''
 192:   const webhookUrl = project?.webhook_url ?? config.webhook_url ?? ''
 193:   const reportBaseUrl = project?.report_base_url ?? config.report_base_url ?? ''
 194:   const rawUploadPermission = project?.raw_upload_permission ?? 'not-set'
 195: 
 196:   if (!mirrorToRepo) {
 197:     logger.warn(
 198:       `[${projectName}] Current branch '${branch}' is not a dedicated MemoryTree branch. ` +
 199:       'Importing to the global archive only.',
 200:     )
 201:   }
 202: 
 203:   const discovered = discoverSourceFiles()
 204:   let importedCount = 0
 205: 
 206:   for (const [client, source] of discovered) {
 207:     let parsed: ParsedTranscript
 208:     try {
 209:       parsed = parseTranscript(client, source)
 210:     } catch {
 211:       logger.debug(`Failed to parse ${source}, skipping.`)
 212:       continue
 213:     }
 214: 
 215:     if (!transcriptHasContent(parsed)) continue
 216:     if (!transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, projectPath, repoSlug)) continue
 217: 
 218:     scanSensitive(parsed, projectPath)
 219: 
 220:     try {
 221:       const result = await importTranscript(parsed, projectPath, globalRoot, repoSlug, rawUploadPermission, mirrorToRepo)
 222:       if (result.status !== 'unchanged') {
 223:         importedCount++
 224:       }
 225:     } catch {
 226:       logger.exception(`Failed to import transcript: ${source}`)
 227:     }
 228:   }
 229: 
 230:   if (importedCount === 0) {
 231:     logger.info(`[${projectName}] No new transcripts to import.`)
 232:   } else {
 233:     logger.info(`[${projectName}] Imported ${importedCount} transcript(s).`)
 234:   }
 235: 
 236:   const reportIndexPath = join(projectPath, 'Memory', '07_reports', 'index.html')
 237:   const shouldBuildReport = generateReport && (
 238:     contextChanged ||
 239:     importedCount > 0 ||
 240:     !existsSync(reportIndexPath)
 241:   )
 242: 
 243:   if (shouldBuildReport) {
 244:     try {
 245:       const { buildReport } = await import('../report/build.js')
 246:       await buildReport({
 247:         root: projectPath,
 248:         output: join(projectPath, 'Memory', '07_reports'),
 249:         noAi: !process.env['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'],
 250:         model: aiSummaryModel,
 251:         locale,
 252:         ghPagesBranch,
 253:         cname,
 254:         webhookUrl,
 255:         reportBaseUrl,
 256:         ...(extraManifestDirs ? { extraManifestDirs } : {}),
 257:       })
 258:       logger.info(`[${projectName}] Report generated.`)
 259:     } catch (err: unknown) {
 260:       logger.warn(`[${projectName}] Report generation failed: ${String(err)}`)
 261:       // Never propagate 鈥?report failure must not abort heartbeat cycle
 262:     }
 263:   }
 264: 
 265:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
 266:     gitCommitAndPush({ auto_push: autoPush }, projectPath, projectName, importedCount, rawUploadPermission)
 267:   } else {
 268:     logger.info(`[${projectName}] Skipped repo-local commit/push on branch '${branch}'.`)
 269:   }
 270: }
 271: 
 272: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 273: // Sensitive pattern scanning
 274: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 275: 
 276: export function scanSensitive(parsed: ParsedTranscript, projectPath: string): void {
 277:   const logger = getLogger()
 278:   for (const msg of parsed.messages) {
 279:     for (const pattern of SENSITIVE_PATTERNS) {
 280:       if (pattern.test(msg.text)) {
 281:         logger.warn(
 282:           `Sensitive pattern detected in transcript ${parsed.source_path} (project: ${basename(projectPath)}, role: ${msg.role})`,
 283:         )
 284:         writeAlert(
 285:           toPosixPath(projectPath),
 286:           'sensitive_match',
 287:           `Sensitive pattern in transcript: ${basename(parsed.source_path)}`,
 288:         )
 289:         return
 290:       }
 291:     }
 292:   }
 293: }
 294: 
 295: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 296: // Git operations
 297: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 298: 
 299: export function gitCommitAndPush(
 300:   config: Pick<Config, 'auto_push'>,
 301:   projectPath: string,
 302:   projectName: string,
 303:   importedCount: number,
 304:   rawUploadPermission: RawUploadPermission = 'not-set',
 305: ): void {
 306:   const logger = getLogger()
 307: 
 308:   const changedPaths = changedManagedPaths(projectPath)
 309:   if (changedPaths.length === 0) {
 310:     logger.info(`[${projectName}] No git changes in managed MemoryTree content.`)
 311:     return
 312:   }
 313: 
 314:   const stageablePaths = changedPaths.filter(path => shouldStageManagedPath(path, rawUploadPermission))
 315:   if (stageablePaths.length === 0) {
 316:     logger.info(`[${projectName}] Only raw transcript mirror changes detected without approval; skipping commit.`)
 317:     return
 318:   }
 319: 
 320:   const commitMessage = importedCount > 0
 321:     ? `memorytree(transcripts): import ${importedCount} transcript(s)`
 322:     : 'memorytree(snapshot): heartbeat sync'
 323: 
 324:   stageManagedPaths(projectPath, stageablePaths)
 325:   git(projectPath, 'commit', '-m', commitMessage)
 326:   if (importedCount > 0) {
 327:     logger.info(`[${projectName}] Committed ${importedCount} transcript import(s).`)
 328:   } else {
 329:     logger.info(`[${projectName}] Committed heartbeat snapshot.`)
 330:   }
 331: 
 332:   if (!config.auto_push) {
 333:     logger.info(`[${projectName}] auto_push disabled, skipping push.`)
 334:     return
 335:   }
 336: 
 337:   const remotes = git(projectPath, 'remote')
 338:   if (!remotes.trim()) {
 339:     logger.warn(`[${projectName}] No git remote configured, skipping push.`)
 340:     writeAlert(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'no_remote', 'Push skipped: no Git remote configured.')
 341:     return
 342:   }
 343: 
 344:   if (!tryPush(projectPath, projectName)) {
 345:     logger.warn(`[${projectName}] Push failed, retrying once...`)
 346:     if (!tryPush(projectPath, projectName)) {
 347:       logger.error(`[${projectName}] Push failed after retry.`)
 348:       writeAlertWithThreshold(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'push_failed', 'Push failed after retry.')
 349:       return
 350:     }
 351:   }
 352: 
 353:   resetFailureCount(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'push_failed')
 354: }
 355: 
 356: export function tryPush(projectPath: string, projectName: string): boolean {
 357:   try {
 358:     const branch = currentBranch(projectPath)
 359:     if (hasTrackingUpstream(projectPath)) {
 360:       const pushed = pushBranchToRemote(projectPath, branch)
 361:       if (pushed.remote === null) {
 362:         return false
 363:       }
 364:       if (pushed.usedFallback && pushed.pushUrl !== null) {
 365:         getLogger().info(`[${projectName}] Pushed successfully via fallback ${redactRemoteUrl(pushed.pushUrl)}.`)
 366:       }
 367:     } else {
 368:       const upstream = ensureBranchUpstream(projectPath, branch)
 369:       if (upstream.remote === null) {
 370:         return false
 371:       }
 372:       const fallbackNote = upstream.usedFallback && upstream.pushUrl !== null
 373:         ? ` via fallback ${redactRemoteUrl(upstream.pushUrl)}`
 374:         : ''
 375:       getLogger().info(`[${projectName}] Configured upstream ${upstream.remote}/${branch}${fallbackNote}.`)
 376:     }
 377:     getLogger().info(`[${projectName}] Pushed successfully.`)
 378:     return true
 379:   } catch {
 380:     return false
 381:   }
 382: }
 383: 
 384: export function currentBranch(projectPath: string): string {
 385:   return git(projectPath, 'rev-parse', '--abbrev-ref', 'HEAD').trim()
 386: }
 387: 
 388: export function isDedicatedMemorytreeBranch(
 389:   branch: string,
 390:   project?: Pick<ProjectEntry, 'memory_branch'>,
 391: ): boolean {
 392:   return isProjectMemoryBranch(branch, project)
 393: }
 394: 
 395: export function changedManagedPaths(projectPath: string): string[] {
 396:   const seen = new Set<string>()
 397:   const paths: string[] = []
 398: 
 399:   for (const path of collectChangedManagedPaths(projectPath)) {
 400:     if (seen.has(path)) continue
 401:     seen.add(path)
 402:     paths.push(path)
 403:   }
 404: 
 405:   return paths
 406: }
 407: 
 408: export function isRepoRawTranscriptPath(path: string): boolean {
 409:   return path.replace(/\\/g, '/').startsWith(RAW_TRANSCRIPT_PREFIX)
 410: }
 411: 
 412: function shouldStageManagedPath(path: string, rawUploadPermission: RawUploadPermission): boolean {
 413:   if (!isRepoRawTranscriptPath(path)) {
 414:     return true
 415:   }
 416: 
 417:   return rawUploadPermission === 'approved'
 418: }
 419: 
 420: function unquotePath(path: string): string {
 421:   if (!(path.startsWith('"') && path.endsWith('"'))) return path
 422: 
 423:   return path
 424:     .slice(1, -1)
 425:     .replace(/\\"/g, '"')
 426:     .replace(/\\\\/g, '\\')
 427: }
 428: 
 429: function collectChangedManagedPaths(projectPath: string): string[] {
 430:   return [
 431:     ...gitPathLines(projectPath, 'diff', '--name-only', '--', ...MANAGED_REPO_PATHS),
 432:     ...gitPathLines(projectPath, 'diff', '--cached', '--name-only', '--', ...MANAGED_REPO_PATHS),
 433:     ...gitPathLines(projectPath, 'ls-files', '--others', '--exclude-standard', '--', ...MANAGED_REPO_PATHS),
 434:     ...gitPathLines(
 435:       projectPath,
 436:       'ls-files',
 437:       '--others',
 438:       '--ignored',
 439:       '--exclude-standard',
 440:       '--',
 441:       ...MANAGED_REPO_PATHS,
 442:     ),
 443:   ]
 444: }
 445: 
 446: function stageManagedPaths(projectPath: string, stageablePaths: readonly string[]): void {
 447:   let batch: string[] = []
 448:   let batchChars = 0
 449: 
 450:   for (const path of stageablePaths) {
 451:     const pathChars = path.length + 1
 452:     if (batch.length > 0 && batchChars + pathChars > MAX_GIT_ADD_PATH_CHARS) {
 453:       git(projectPath, 'add', '-A', '-f', '--', ...batch)
 454:       batch = []
 455:       batchChars = 0
 456:     }
 457: 
 458:     batch.push(path)
 459:     batchChars += pathChars
 460:   }
 461: 
 462:   if (batch.length > 0) {
 463:     git(projectPath, 'add', '-A', '-f', '--', ...batch)
 464:   }
 465: }
 466: 
 467: function gitPathLines(projectPath: string, ...args: string[]): string[] {
 468:   const output = git(projectPath, ...args)
 469:   const paths: string[] = []
 470: 
 471:   for (const rawLine of output.split(/\r?\n/)) {
 472:     const path = unquotePath(rawLine.trim())
 473:     if (!path) continue
 474:     paths.push(path)
 475:   }
 476: 
 477:   return paths
 478: }
Tool Result #304 shell_command call_2wIWmYlI6dYlabFUUdGQHYu8 exit 0 04:15:59
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.7 seconds Output: Using Node v20.20.1 Using Node v20.20.1 1: /** 2: * CLI: memorytree discover 鈥?scan and import local transcripts. 3: * Port of script...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.7 seconds
Output:
Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
   1: /**
   2:  * CLI: memorytree discover 鈥?scan and import local transcripts.
   3:  * Port of scripts/discover-transcripts.py
   4:  */
   5: 
   6: import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'
   7: import { basename, resolve } from 'node:path'
   8: 
   9: import { CLIENTS, slugify } from '../transcript/common.js'
  10: import { defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot, discoverSourceFiles, inferProjectSlug, transcriptMatchesRepo } from '../transcript/discover.js'
  11: import { importTranscript, transcriptHasContent } from '../transcript/import.js'
  12: import { parseTranscript } from '../transcript/parse.js'
  13: import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
  14: 
  15: export interface DiscoverOptions {
  16:   root: string
  17:   client: string
  18:   scope: string
  19:   projectName: string
  20:   globalRoot: string
  21:   rawUploadPermission: string
  22:   limit: number
  23:   format: string
  24: }
  25: 
  26: export async function cmdDiscover(options: DiscoverOptions): Promise<number> {
  27:   const root = resolve(options.root)
  28:   if (!existsSync(root)) {
  29:     process.stderr.write(`root does not exist: ${root}\n`)
  30:     return 1
  31:   }
  32: 
  33:   const repoSlug = slugify(options.projectName.trim() || basename(root), 'project')
  34:   const globalRoot = options.globalRoot ? resolve(options.globalRoot) : defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()
  35:   const requestedClients = options.client === 'all' ? CLIENTS : new Set([options.client])
  36:   const discovered = discoverSourceFiles(requestedClients)
  37: 
  38:   const results: Record<string, unknown>[] = []
  39:   const skipped: Record<string, string>[] = []
  40: 
  41:   for (const [client, source] of discovered) {
  42:     if (options.limit > 0 && results.length >= options.limit) break
  43: 
  44:     let parsed
  45:     try {
  46:       parsed = parseTranscript(client, source)
  47:     } catch (err: unknown) {
  48:       skipped.push({
  49:         client,
  50:         source,
  51:         reason: 'parse-error',
  52:         error: summarizeException(err),
  53:       })
  54:       continue
  55:     }
  56: 
  57:     const candidateProject = inferProjectSlug(parsed)
  58:     const matchesCurrentRepo = transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, root, repoSlug)
  59: 
  60:     if (!transcriptHasContent(parsed)) {
  61:       skipped.push({ client, source, reason: 'no-importable-content', project: candidateProject })
  62:       continue
  63:     }
  64: 
  65:     if (options.scope === 'current-project' && !matchesCurrentRepo) {
  66:       skipped.push({ client, source, reason: 'unrelated-project', project: candidateProject })
  67:       continue
  68:     }
  69: 
  70:     try {
  71:       const result = await importTranscript(
  72:         parsed,
  73:         root,
  74:         globalRoot,
  75:         matchesCurrentRepo ? repoSlug : candidateProject,
  76:         matchesCurrentRepo ? options.rawUploadPermission : 'not-applicable',
  77:         matchesCurrentRepo,
  78:       )
  79:       if (result.status === 'unchanged') {
  80:         skipped.push({ client, source, reason: 'already-imported', project: candidateProject })
  81:       } else {
  82:         results.push({ ...result, matches_current_repo: matchesCurrentRepo })
  83:       }
  84:     } catch (err: unknown) {
  85:       skipped.push({
  86:         client,
  87:         source,
  88:         reason: 'import-error',
  89:         project: candidateProject,
  90:         error: summarizeException(err),
  91:       })
  92:     }
  93:   }
  94: 
  95:   const payload = {
  96:     repo: toPosixPath(root),
  97:     repo_project: repoSlug,
  98:     scope: options.scope,
  99:     client_filter: options.client,
 100:     discovered_count: discovered.length,
 101:     imported_count: results.length,
 102:     repo_mirror_count: results.filter(r => r['matches_current_repo']).length,
 103:     global_only_count: results.filter(r => !r['matches_current_repo']).length,
 104:     skipped_count: skipped.length,
 105:     imports: results,
 106:     skipped,
 107:   }
 108: 
 109:   if (options.format === 'json') {
 110:     process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(payload) + '\n')
 111:   } else {
 112:     process.stdout.write(formatDiscoverText(payload) + '\n')
 113:   }
 114:   return 0
 115: }
 116: 
 117: function formatDiscoverText(payload: Record<string, unknown>): string {
 118:   const lines = [
 119:     `repo: ${payload['repo'] ?? ''}`,
 120:     `repo_project: ${payload['repo_project'] ?? ''}`,
 121:     `scope: ${payload['scope'] ?? ''}`,
 122:     `client_filter: ${payload['client_filter'] ?? ''}`,
 123:     `discovered_count: ${payload['discovered_count'] ?? 0}`,
 124:     `imported_count: ${payload['imported_count'] ?? 0}`,
 125:     `repo_mirror_count: ${payload['repo_mirror_count'] ?? 0}`,
 126:     `global_only_count: ${payload['global_only_count'] ?? 0}`,
 127:     `skipped_count: ${payload['skipped_count'] ?? 0}`,
 128:   ]
 129: 
 130:   const imports = payload['imports']
 131:   if (Array.isArray(imports) && imports.length > 0) {
 132:     lines.push('imports:')
 133:     for (const item of imports.slice(0, 10)) {
 134:       const rec = item as Record<string, unknown>
 135:       lines.push(`- ${rec['client']} ${rec['project']} ${rec['session_id']} repo_mirror=${String(rec['matches_current_repo']).toLowerCase()}`)
 136:     }
 137:     if (imports.length > 10) lines.push(`- ... ${imports.length - 10} more`)
 138:   }
 139:   return lines.join('\n')
 140: }
 141: 
 142: function summarizeException(err: unknown): string {
 143:   if (err instanceof Error) return err.message.trim() || err.constructor.name
 144:   return String(err)
 145: }

Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## Read Order\n- Read this file first.\n- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.\n- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.\n- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.\n\n## Memory Rules\n- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.\n- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.\n- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.\n- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.\n- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.\n\n## Transcript Rules\n- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.\n- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.\n- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.\n- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.\n- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.\n- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.\n\n## Git Rules\n- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.\n- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.\n- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.\n- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.\n- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.\n- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.\n\n## Heartbeat Rules\n- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.\n- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.\n- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.\n- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.\n- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients, and generate a continuation summary.\n- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

assistant #322 final_answer 04:42:10

遇到的问题是：heartbeat 每 5 分钟都会把同一批已经导入过的 transcript 再走一遍处理流程，所以日志里会反复出现固定数字，比如 `memorytree-workflow` 一直是 `Imported 78 transcript(s)`。这不代表每次真有 78 条新 transcript，而是代码把“再次扫描到并重新处理”也算成了“新导入”。 根因主要有两处： - 在 [heartbeat.ts](/d:/dem...

Expand full message

遇到的问题是：heartbeat 每 5 分钟都会把同一批已经导入过的 transcript 再走一遍处理流程，所以日志里会反复出现固定数字，比如 memorytree-workflow 一直是 Imported 78 transcript(s)。这不代表每次真有 78 条新 transcript，而是代码把“再次扫描到并重新处理”也算成了“新导入”。

根因主要有两处：

- 在 [heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts) 里，processProject() 之前是只要匹配到 transcript，就直接 importTranscript()，然后 importedCount++，没有判断它是不是早就导入过。
- 在 [import.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/transcript/import.ts) 里，之前没有明确返回“这次是新建、更新、还是完全没变化”，所以上层没法区分真正的新导入和重复处理。
- 结果就是 heartbeat 不但会误报导入数，还会频繁重建 report，进一步造成反复 commit / push 报告文件。

我已经改了仓库代码，不是本地 skill 模板。改动在这些文件里：

- [import.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/transcript/import.ts)：给导入结果加了 status: created | updated | unchanged，并且只有文件内容真的变化时才重写。
- [heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts)：只有 status !== unchanged 才计入 importedCount；report 也改成只有在上下文变了、真的有新导入，或者 report 不存在时才重建。
- [cmd-discover.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-discover.ts)：把重复导入记成 already-imported，不再算进 imported_count。
- [recall.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/recall/recall.ts)：同步时只统计真正新增/更新的导入。
- [cmd-import.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-import.ts)：输出里加了 status。
- 测试也一起补了：[import.test.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/tests/transcript/import.test.ts)、[integration.test.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/tests/transcript/integration.test.ts)。

我已经跑过验证：

- npm test -- --run tests/transcript/import.test.ts tests/transcript/integration.test.ts tests/recall/recall.test.ts
- npm test -- --run tests/heartbeat/heartbeat.test.ts tests/heartbeat/config.test.ts
- npm run typecheck

这些都通过了。

现在状态是：

- 代码已经改在仓库里
- 还没提交、还没推送
- 本地 skill 代码没动

如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接帮你再跑一次本仓库的 heartbeat run-once，验证修复后日志会不会从反复 Imported 78 transcript(s) 变成 No new transcripts to import.

token_count #323 04:42:20
total_tokens=3039716
total 3039716in 3273895out 54624reason 14951

遇到的问题是：heartbeat 每 5 分钟都会把同一批已经导入过的 transcript 再走一遍处理流程，所以日志里会反复出现固定数字，比如 memorytree-workflow 一直是 Imported 78 transcript(s)。这不代表每次真有 78 条新 transcript，而是代码把“再次扫描到并重新处理”也算成了“新导入”。

根因主要有两处：

- 在 [heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts) 里，processProject() 之前是只要匹配到 transcript，就直接 importTranscript()，然后 importedCount++，没有判断它是不是早就导入过。
- 在 [import.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/transcript/import.ts) 里，之前没有明确返回“这次是新建、更新、还是完全没变化”，所以上层没法区分真正的新导入和重复处理。
- 结果就是 heartbeat 不但会误报导入数，还会频繁重建 report，进一步造成反复 commit / push 报告文件。

我已经改了仓库代码，不是本地 skill 模板。改动在这些文件里：

- [import.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/transcript/import.ts)：给导入结果加了 status: created | updated | unchanged，并且只有文件内容真的变化时才重写。
- [heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts)：只有 status !== unchanged 才计入 importedCount；report 也改成只有在上下文变了、真的有新导入，或者 report 不存在时才重建。
- [cmd-discover.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-discover.ts)：把重复导入记成 already-imported，不再算进 imported_count。
- [recall.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/recall/recall.ts)：同步时只统计真正新增/更新的导入。
- [cmd-import.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-import.ts)：输出里加了 status。
- 测试也一起补了：[import.test.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/tests/transcript/import.test.ts)、[integration.test.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/tests/transcript/integration.test.ts)。

我已经跑过验证：

- npm test -- --run tests/transcript/import.test.ts tests/transcript/integration.test.ts tests/recall/recall.test.ts
- npm test -- --run tests/heartbeat/heartbeat.test.ts tests/heartbeat/config.test.ts
- npm run typecheck

这些都通过了。

现在状态是：

- 代码已经改在仓库里
- 还没提交、还没推送
- 本地 skill 代码没动

如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接帮你再跑一次本仓库的 heartbeat run-once，验证修复后日志会不会从反复 Imported 78 transcript(s) 变成 No new transcripts to import.

  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## Read Order\n- Read this file first.\n- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.\n- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.\n- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.\n\n## Memory Rules\n- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.\n- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.\n- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.\n- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.\n- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.\n\n## Transcript Rules\n- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.\n- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.\n- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.\n- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.\n- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.\n- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.\n\n## Git Rules\n- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.\n- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.\n- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.\n- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.\n- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.\n- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.\n\n## Heartbeat Rules\n- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.\n- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.\n- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.\n- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.\n- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients, and generate a continuation summary.\n- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}
user #327 04:43:16

通俗的解释一下吧 我看不懂

token_count #328 04:43:18
total_tokens=3039716
total 3039716in 3273895out 54624reason 14951
assistant #329 final_answer 04:43:26

通俗讲，就是它“记性不好”。

本来 heartbeat 应该像这样工作：

1. 看一眼有没有新 transcript
2. 只有真的新东西，才导入、生成报告、提交、推送
3. 没新东西就安静跳过

但现在它更像这样：

1. 每 5 分钟把同一堆 transcript 又翻出来
2. 不太会分辨“这是新来的”还是“这个我上次已经处理过了”
3. 所以日志里老是写 Imported 78 transcript(s)
4. 后面报告也跟着反复重算，于是又产生 commit / push

所以问题不是“heartbeat 没在跑”，恰恰相反，是“它一直在跑，但有点傻，一直重复干旧活”。

我改的代码，核心就是教它学会这件事：

- 这条 transcript 是第一次见到
- 这条 transcript 虽然见过，但内容后来变了
- 这条 transcript 完全没变，别再算成新导入了

改完以后，正常效果应该是：

- 真有新 transcript 时，才显示导入数量
- 没新 transcript 时，会更接近 No new transcripts to import.
- report 不会每 5 分钟都白白重建
- commit / push 频率会明显降下来

所以一句话总结：

之前的问题是“它把旧东西反复当成新东西处理”，我改的是“让它认得出哪些其实是旧东西”。

token_count #330 04:43:27
total_tokens=3176749
total 3176749in 3410584out 55312reason 14951
task_completed #331 019d2874-3092-7562-9e43-b71abd83f9db 04:43:27

通俗讲，就是它“记性不好”。

本来 heartbeat 应该像这样工作：

1. 看一眼有没有新 transcript
2. 只有真的新东西，才导入、生成报告、提交、推送
3. 没新东西就安静跳过

但现在它更像这样：

1. 每 5 分钟把同一堆 transcript 又翻出来
2. 不太会分辨“这是新来的”还是“这个我上次已经处理过了”
3. 所以日志里老是写 Imported 78 transcript(s)
4. 后面报告也跟着反复重算，于是又产生 commit / push

所以问题不是“heartbeat 没在跑”，恰恰相反，是“它一直在跑，但有点傻，一直重复干旧活”。

我改的代码，核心就是教它学会这件事：

- 这条 transcript 是第一次见到
- 这条 transcript 虽然见过，但内容后来变了
- 这条 transcript 完全没变，别再算成新导入了

改完以后，正常效果应该是：

- 真有新 transcript 时，才显示导入数量
- 没新 transcript 时，会更接近 No new transcripts to import.
- report 不会每 5 分钟都白白重建
- commit / push 频率会明显降下来

所以一句话总结：

之前的问题是“它把旧东西反复当成新东西处理”，我改的是“让它认得出哪些其实是旧东西”。

user #334 04:44:41

我们如何处理的 是最佳实践吗 是从源头处理的吗 请review 2次你的修改

token_count #335 04:44:46
total_tokens=3176749
total 3176749in 3410584out 55312reason 14951
reasoning #336 04:45:47

assistant #337 final_answer 04:46:07

**二次 Review 结论** 我刚把自己的改动按“正确性”和“设计层次”各 review 了一遍。结论是：没有发现阻塞级 bug，这版修复是合理的，但它是“核心层修复”，还不是“最前置源头”的终局最佳实践。 **我们是怎么处理的** 这次不是去改日志文案，也不是手工删缓存，而是改了仓库里真正负责导入和 heartbeat 的核心代码。 - 在 [import.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/...

Expand full message

二次 Review 结论

我刚把自己的改动按“正确性”和“设计层次”各 review 了一遍。结论是：没有发现阻塞级 bug，这版修复是合理的，但它是“核心层修复”，还不是“最前置源头”的终局最佳实践。

我们是怎么处理的

这次不是去改日志文案，也不是手工删缓存，而是改了仓库里真正负责导入和 heartbeat 的核心代码。

- 在 [import.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/transcript/import.ts#L21) 里，我让一次导入明确返回三种状态：created、updated、unchanged。
- 在 [heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L203) 里，我把“计数”和“后续动作”改成只对 created/updated 生效。
- 在 [heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L236) 里，我让 report 只在“真的有新变化”时才重建，不再每 5 分钟白跑。
- 在 [cmd-discover.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-discover.ts#L70) 和 [recall.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/recall/recall.ts#L95) 里，也统一用了这个状态判断，避免 CLI 和 recall 继续把旧东西算成新导入。

通俗说，就是以前它每次都说“我又导入了 78 条”，现在改成先判断：
- 这是第一次见到
- 这是旧的但内容变了
- 这是旧的而且完全没变

只有前两种才继续算“新导入”。

这算不算最佳实践

算“正确方向上的实践”，但我不会说它已经是完整最佳实践。

这版已经做到的是：

- 导入逻辑幂等
- heartbeat 不再把老 transcript 反复算成新导入
- report 不再因为假增量反复重建
- 测试和 typecheck 都过了

我已经跑过：

- npm test -- --run tests/transcript/import.test.ts tests/transcript/integration.test.ts tests/recall/recall.test.ts
- npm test -- --run tests/heartbeat/heartbeat.test.ts tests/heartbeat/config.test.ts
- npm run typecheck

但“终局最佳实践”通常还会再往前推一层：

1. 在 discover 阶段就做持久化增量游标，不要每 5 分钟全量扫全量 parse。
2. 在 import 阶段做幂等。
3. 在 report build 阶段按输入 hash/版本决定是否跳过。
4. 日志里区分 scanned / matched / imported / updated / unchanged。

我这次实际做到了第 2 点，部分做到了第 3 点，还没有做到第 1 点。所以它是“从核心源头处理”，但不是“最前置源头处理”。

我二次 review 后保留的两个风险

- 风险 1：heartbeat 还是会全量扫描 transcript 源，只是不会再把它们误算成新导入。
位置在 [heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L203)。
这意味着 CPU/扫描成本还在，只是重复 commit/push 和误报导入数的问题被压住了。

- 风险 2：我把 report 改成“无变化就不重建”，这对 heartbeat 是对的，但如果以后只是改了 report 渲染代码、没有新 transcript，heartbeat 不会主动重建一次。
位置在 [heartbeat.ts](/d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L236)。
这种场景下需要手动跑一次 report build，或者再做一层“report code version”触发。

我的判断

- 是从核心逻辑处理的，不是表面补丁。
- 是合理修复，不是糊弄。
- 但还不是最彻底的源头优化。
- 如果你要把这块做到更“最佳实践”，下一步应该补“discover 增量游标/去重索引”。

如果你愿意，我下一步可以继续做真正的“源头版”优化：让 heartbeat 在发现阶段就跳过已处理源文件，而不是每轮都全量扫。

total 3317915in 3547647out 63518reason 18026
task_completed #339 019d2875-7dda-7d20-a181-8397446ed7da 04:46:07

  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## Read Order\n- Read this file first.\n- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.\n- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.\n- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.\n\n## Memory Rules\n- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.\n- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.\n- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.\n- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.\n- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.\n\n## Transcript Rules\n- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.\n- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.\n- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.\n- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.\n- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.\n- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.\n\n## Git Rules\n- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.\n- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.\n- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.\n- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.\n- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.\n- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.\n\n## Heartbeat Rules\n- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.\n- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.\n- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.\n- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.\n- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients, and generate a continuation summary.\n- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}
